[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A man lounges on a bed in a room while bold text at the top and bottom reads “TIDUR BRO” and “BESOK NGANGGUR”.

Main Subject:
A shirtless man with short dark hair reclines on a bed, leaning on his left arm and propping himself up slightly with his legs extended; he wears a white sleeveless shirt draped across his torso and blue jeans, with his right hand resting near his thigh.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors in a bedroom-like setting, with a textured gray bedspread covering the mattress surface and a light-colored wall with vertical lines or paneling in the background.

Visual Details:
The lighting is even and indoor, creating soft shadows under his arm and along the bedding. The composition is centered on the reclining figure, with large, high-contrast white block text outlined in black positioned at the top and bottom of the image.

Visible Text:
TIDUR BRO
BESOK NGANGGUR

Practical Summary:
The image shows a reclining man on a bed wearing a white sleeveless top and blue jeans. Large text overlays the image above and below him.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

TIDUR BRO  
BESOK  
NGANGGUR  

# Structured Version

- TIDUR BRO  
- BESOK  
- NGANGGUR  

# Notes

No unclear text detected.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
